reviews.review_description:
Wow ! this game is really amazing !
I love the chill but profound theme. The table/sitting position makes it really accessible. There's lot of content and details, stories and narrative moments. I really want to learn more about the game as I go along.
The dystopian cultural fantasy around the game is also really intriguing and fun to discover.

A very unique gameplay, thought for virtual reality, and an immersive atmosphere. The liveliness of the city is very nice to look at in itself, the gameplay varied and engaging, and the cultural topics really relevant !

Although the game is more like a board game, immersion in the atmosphere passes unnoticed, the game simultaneously relaxes and then requires to quickly intensify reasoning and make a decision to help the characters

Only been playing up til chapter 3 and this game has me absolutely hooked! The story unfolds as you progress, the characters and stories of the city folk really hit home. Just love it and cannot wait to see what else the developers come up with! Great job!
I really dug the unique vibe, the gameplay that slowly but surely levels up, and the story that ties it all together.
